## User Story
As a **[role]**, I need **[feature]**, so that **[benefit]**.

## Acceptance Criteria

Given [a specific precondition or context]
When [a specific action is performed]
Then [a specific expected outcome occurs]

## Additional Notes
_Any extra context or notes._
```
